title: H26 metrics.json field set
description: Enumerates the metrics.json fields the gate authority (evaluate.py) reads (build doc §12/§15). SKELETON authored at C2 with metrics.py; FINALIZED at C6 with the gate-application half. Every metric value is a CI {point, low, high, b}. All AUC/FITB values are FRACTIONS (FITB is a fraction, not a percent). metrics.json itself is emission-gated: nothing at C3 (only selection.json), gate/judge fields unlock at C4, closet/transfer fields merge at C5, finalized at C6 (build doc §15 artifact-dataflow). The paired gate-difference CIs are required because raw component CIs cannot reconstruct the paired bootstrap.

ci.description: A point estimate with a 95% percentile cluster-bootstrap interval (metrics.CI). half_width is derived (high-low)/2, not stored.

unlock_file.description: Committed unlock-file identity recorded before metrics.json emission.

_meta.description: Provenance, unlock identity, and sealed checkpoint binding. Unlock files are validation+hash records, not a presence boolean.

judge_ledger_sha256.description: sha256 of the committed gate-B judge_runs.ndjson the gate-B numbers were computed from (RUN-phase emit binds provenance; optional — absent in hermetic assemblies).

closet_metrics_sha256.description: sha256 of the closet_metrics.json the C5 merge folded in (domain_probe.py provenance; required from stage C5).

selection.description: The sealed C3 selection artifact whose checkpoint this metrics.json evaluates.

AUC_catalog_pair.description: Gate A + reported transfer. Pooled pair-level ROC-AUC of the trained head on the strict-disjoint test pairs. Cluster = (positive,negative) pair.

AUC_zero_shot_cosine.description: Gate A floor. Pooled pair-level ROC-AUC of the same-backbone zero-shot cosine, same test pairs (paired with AUC_catalog_pair).

gate_A_diff.description: Paired CI of AUC_catalog_pair - AUC_zero_shot_cosine. GO iff CI_low > 0.

fitb_trained_gateB.description: Gate B. Trained-head FITB@4 on the gate-B prefix (the judge-scored set).

fitb_judge_gateB.description: Gate B. gpt-5.4-mini image-only FITB@4 on the same gate-B prefix. The paired two-stage bootstrap reads judge_runs.ndjson joined on question_id, not just this scalar.

gate_B_diff_inconsistent_miss.description: Paired CI of fitb_trained_gateB - fitb_judge_gateB under inconsistent=miss. GO iff CI_low >= -0.05 AND half_width <= 0.05.

gate_B_diff_inconsistent_half.description: Same diff under inconsistent=0.5 (the second convention; B-pass conservative only if both agree).

outfit_auc.description: Gate D. Pooled outfit-level ROC-AUC (mean-edge score; positive vs same-fine-category-corrupted negative outfit). Cluster = source outfit. GO iff CI_low >= 0.81.

fitb_trained_full.description: Gate D. Trained-head FITB@4 over the full eligible held-out test set. GO iff CI_low >= 0.50.

AUC_closet_pair.description: Reported transfer (NOT gated). Pair-level closet AUC; read CI_low against the >= 0.70 band. Added at C5.

catalog_closet_drop.description: Reported transfer (NOT gated). AUC_catalog_pair - AUC_closet_pair, unpaired two-independent bootstrap; read CI_high against the <= 0.12 band. Added at C5.

AUC_cooccurrence_edge.description: Leak detector (must be ~0.50). Category-pair co-occurrence edge score; a deviation reveals category leakage in the negative sampler. Outside the reported ladder.

AUC_cooccurrence_outfit.description: Leak detector (must be ~0.50). Category-only outfit-level score on the gate-D corruption.

AUC_pop_edge.description: Popularity-confound diagnostic. Item-popularity-only pair-level AUC; > 0.55 (the blind margin) -> headline labeled popularity-confounded + sensitivity re-run.

AUC_pop_outfit.description: Popularity-confound diagnostic at outfit-level; same 0.55 margin.

fitb_popularity.description: Popularity-confound diagnostic at FITB (§C.6, baselines.popularity_fitb_hits). Most-popular-candidate FITB@4 accuracy: each candidate scored by its split outfit-frequency alone, argmax read with the 1/k tie rule. Quantifies the FITB answer-selection shortcut (build_fitb draws the answer from a real outfit -> popularity-biased) the edge/outfit AUC diagnostics miss. REPORTED against the 0.25 chance floor; NOT a gate and NOT margin-triggered (the 0.55 blind margin stays edge/outfit-only).

fitb_zero_shot_cosine.description: Baseline ladder readout: zero-shot cosine FITB@4 (non-learned floor).

AUC_pair_item_level.description: Seam ablation (§6/§C.2). The capacity-matched item-level head's pooled PAIR-level AUC on the identical test pairs (item-level per-edge score = 0.5*(g(i)+g(j))). The item-level term of the PINNED seam-falsification metric.

outfit_auc_item_level.description: Seam ablation (§6) — REPORTED DESCRIPTIVELY, NOT the falsification statistic. The item-level head's outfit-level AUC.

fitb_item_level_full.description: Seam ablation (§6) — REPORTED DESCRIPTIVELY, NOT the falsification statistic. Item-level head FITB on the full set.

seam_diff_pairwise_minus_item_level.description: The PINNED seam-falsification metric (§C.2): paired CI of AUC_catalog_pair - AUC_pair_item_level (pooled PAIR-level AUC, shared (pos,neg) pair clusters). 'Falsified' requires Holm-adjusted p < 0.05 AND this CI_low > 0 (build doc §6/§11). See seam_holm_adjusted_p.

seam_holm_adjusted_p.description: Holm-Bonferroni-adjusted bootstrap two-sided p for the shape-diff hypothesis on pair-level AUC (not a CI).

popularity_matched_sensitivity.description: The MANDATORY C6 §C.6 sensitivity re-run (the pre-registered popularity diagnostic fired: AUC_pop_outfit > 0.55). Same-fine-category negatives re-drawn within ±1 popularity-decile of the replaced positive partner (deciles over the split's full item-popularity distribution); gate-A pair-level AUCs + diff and the gate-D outfit AUC recomputed. REPORTED ONLY — gate numbers never move.

seed_robustness.description: The §C.7 3-seed robustness footnote: the whole negative set re-rolled on the pre-registered seeds; the A/D gate legs re-read per seed (headline-seed values copied from this file, not recomputed — bit-determinism proven at emit). Gate B is structurally seed-pinned (frozen fitb_order.json + committed ledger) — see gate_b_note. The frozen rule requires the gate verdict to agree across all 3 seeds; a seed that flips a gate is a finding, not noise.

rule.const: gate verdict (A/B/D pass/fail) must agree across all 3 seeds

coherence_sensitivity.description: Coherence-sliced sensitivity (preregistration.md §F amendment 2026-07-01) — REPORTED, NEVER GATING. The eval sets stay the standard unfiltered benchmark; each FITB question carries the mechanical 5-type coherence flag (coherence.py) and the gate-B diffs / judge inconsistency rate / gate-D FITB are reported per slice. Slice CIs are null when a slice has no kept question (empty, or every question judge-dropped). Pre-committed response: if the coherent-slice gate-B verdict disagrees with the headline, results.md labels gate B 'coherence-sensitive (disclosed)'; gate numbers never move.

_stage_requirements._note: The root `required` list is the C4 A^B^D gate input set. `allOf` below makes C5 transfer fields and C6 seam-ablation + mandatory-sensitivity fields real schema requirements, keyed by _meta.stage.
